title: Meet Me at Dawn
writer: Marcel Achard, Maurice Cowan, Anatole Litvak
actors: William Eythe, Stanley Holloway, Hazel Court
plot: A young man makes his living in Paris in 1900 by fighting duels on behalf of other parties. He's hired to injure a leading politician and starts to get involved with a girl he uses to provoke the challenge. One newspaper, hostile ...
